content:
[
  {
    "task_id": "castle-floorplan-001",
    "title": "Design castle floor plan layout structure",
    "description": "Create a detailed layout plan for the castle floor, positioning the Throne Room at the top center, flanked by Council rooms, with workshops, forge, and dungeon on lower floors. Define room connections, corridors, doorways, and stairs to form an organic castle map.",
    "context_references": ["castle-architecture.md", "floorplan-guidelines.md", "ui-layout-specs.json"],
    "acceptance_criteria": [
      "Rooms connected by corridors",
      "Castle floor plan layout with organic structure",
      "Doorways between rooms visible",
      "Layout replaces previous rigid 3-column grid"
    ],
    "token_budget": 2500,
    "assignee_role": "Knight",
    "dependencies": []
  },
  {
    "task_id": "castle-floorplan-002",
    "title": "Implement castle floor plan layout in UI",
    "description": "Using the approved floor plan structure, implement the castle floor plan layout in the UI codebase. Replace the existing 3-column grid with the new organic layout including throne room, council rooms, workshops, forge, dungeon, corridors, doorways, and stairs. Ensure visual clarity of connections and doorways.",
    "context_references": ["ui-components/floorplan.jsx", "styles/floorplan.css", "castle-floorplan-001"],
    "acceptance_criteria": [
      "New layout replaces old 3-column grid",
      "Throne Room at top center with connected hallways",
      "Council rooms flanking throne room",
      "Lower floors for workshops, forge, dungeon",
      "Corridors, doorways, and stairs visible and functional",
      "Code changes limited to floorplan UI components and styles"
    ],
    "token_budget": 7000,
    "assignee_role": "Knight",
    "dependencies": ["castle-floorplan-001"]
  },
  {
    "task_id": "castle-floorplan-003",
    "title": "Review and validate castle floor plan implementation",
    "description": "Review the implemented castle floor plan layout for correctness. Verify that the layout matches the design, all rooms are connected by corridors, doorways are visible, and the old grid is fully replaced. Confirm no unauthorized files are modified and acceptance criteria are fully met.",
    "context_references": ["castle-floorplan-002", "code-review-guidelines.md"],
    "acceptance_criteria": [
      "Diff applies cleanly",
      "Only allowed files modified",
      "All acceptance criteria from tasks 1 and 2 met",
      "No security or style violations"
    ],
    "token_budget": 1500,
    "assignee_role": "Nobility",
    "dependencies": ["castle-floorplan-002"]
  }
]
